channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: House Ethics Committee secretly investigated North Carolina Democrat
Trump praises Phelan after sudden exit as Navy chief
item.description: President says ousted Navy secretary did 'outstanding job' helping rebuild fleet.

item.title: Agriculture Secretary Rollins mulls reviving Biden fertilizer program
item.description: Trump administration considers continuing domestic fertilizer initiative.

item.title: Left-leaning data analyst celebrates Trump effect on market: 'It's up like a rocket!'
Republicans fail to attach SAVE America Act to funding package
item.description: Four GOP senators vote against voter ID amendment in immigration enforcement bill.

item.title: 'VEXIT' movement reignites as West Virginia invites disenfranchised Virginians
item.description: Mountain State pushes for secession of Virginia counties after redistricting approval.

item.title: DOJ targets 384 for denaturalization in expanded crackdown
item.description: Justice Department identifies foreign-born Americans for citizenship revocation.

item.title: Trump praises ousted Navy Secretary Phelan amid Pentagon tensions
item.description: Sources say removal followed months of disagreements over shipbuilding and command.

item.title: Four GOP senators doom Sen. John Kennedy's SAVE America Act fix
DOJ official Dhillon says Virginia gun laws could face federal challenge
item.description: Senior Justice Department official questions constitutionality of state restrictions.

item.title: Trump border czar Tom Homan wants Pope Leo XIV to ride along with ICE
item.description: Homan invites pope to join officers amid Vatican feud over immigration.

item.title: Defeated Virginia Republicans regroup for last-chance fight to save House majority
item.description: Redistricting battle heads to state Supreme Court after ballot language blocked.

item.title: FBI busts 43 Mexican Mafia members in major California takedown
DOJ indictment puts SPLC's massive war chest under microscope
NTSB calls for alcohol detection on all new school buses
item.description: Recommendation follows West Virginia crash that led to amputation and injuries.
